sql_array: CREATE TABLE system_info (id Int32, kernel_version String);
SELECT id, kernel_version FROM system_info WHERE (id BETWEEN 0 AND 2) AND kernel_version IS NOT NULL;
SELECT id, COUNT(*) FROM (SELECT id, kernel_version FROM system_info WHERE kernel_version BETWEEN '5.0.0' AND getOSKernelVersion()) GROUP BY id HAVING COUNT(*) > 0;
SELECT id, kernel_version FROM system_info WHERE id = (SELECT id FROM system_info WHERE kernel_version BETWEEN '4.0.0' AND getOSKernelVersion()) ORDER BY kernel_version DESC;
CREATE TABLE kernel_test (test_id Int32, test_value String) ENGINE = MergeTree() ORDER BY test_id;
INSERT INTO kernel_test VALUES (1, 'Kernel version: ' || getOSKernelVersion() || ' at ' || toString(now()));
SELECT test_id, test_value FROM kernel_test WHERE (test_id BETWEEN 1 AND 2) AND test_value LIKE '%Kernel version%' OR test_value IS NULL;
SELECT kernel_version, COUNT(*) FROM (SELECT getOSKernelVersion() as kernel_version) GROUP BY kernel_version HAVING COUNT(*) > 1;
WITH (SELECT getOSKernelVersion()) AS curr_kernel SELECT id FROM system_info WHERE id IS NULL OR (id BETWEEN 1 AND 10) AND kernel_version NOT LIKE curr_kernel;
